title: DORA — ICT third-party risk requirements
summary: Digital Operational Resilience Act mandates register of information and exit strategies for critical ICT providers.

title: EBA Guidelines on outsourcing arrangements
summary: Outsourcing register and risk assessment obligations for critical/important functions.

title: FCA operational resilience policy (PS21/3)
summary: Important business services must remain within impact tolerances, including third-party dependencies.

title: OCC third-party risk management guidance
summary: Interagency guidance on managing risks across the full third-party relationship lifecycle.

title: EU AI Act — high-risk system obligations
summary: Vendors providing AI components may trigger conformity and transparency obligations.

title: GDPR international data transfer (SCC refresh)
summary: Refresh Standard Contractual Clauses and transfer impact assessments for non-EU processors.
